case.title: CHESAPEAKE & O R. CO. v. COOPER

opinion.h4: CHESAPEAKE & O R. CO. v. COOPER, (1916)
opinion.h2: CHESAPEAKE & OHIO RAILWAY COMPANY, Plaintiff in Error, v. F. H. COOPER. No. 455.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. E. L. Worthington, W. D. Cochran, and LeWright Browning for plaintiff in error.
Mr. Allan D. Cole for defendant in error.
Dismissed pursuant to the Twenty-eighth Rule, per stipulation of counsel.
